The '''Garoos''' (adj. '''Garoosh''') were a member [[Species/Legends|species]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. They could be found in all levels of Republic society. At the same time that a Garoosh [[Senator/Legends|senator's]] voice was heard in debates on the [[Caamas Document]] and the return of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], another Garoos named [[Cromf]] was an informant for the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Mazzic]].<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

Garoos had [[ear cluster]]s which could be opened and closed, and spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] with an odd, whistling accent. They breathed through purple-tinged [[gillis flap]]s.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

==Appearances==
